goal_text:
You want to book a 'taxi'. The taxi should depart from 'arbury lodge guesthouse' and should go to 'whale of a time'.
The taxi should 'leave after 13:00'.
Make sure you get 'car type' and 'contact number'.

message: You want to book a taxi. The taxi should depart from arbury lodge guesthouse and should go to whale of a time
